evals.prompt: Set up a virtual environment for my Python project that has a requirements.txt file
evals.expected_output: Should detect Python, create .venv using uv (or pip venv as fallback), activate it, and install dependencies from requirements.txt

evals.prompt: I need to set up my Node.js project with nvm 24. Create the .nvmrc file and install dependencies
evals.expected_output: Should detect Node.js, create .nvmrc with version 24, load nvm, install node version 24, use it, and run npm install

evals.prompt: Start work on a new Python project. Set up the virtual environment using uv and create a pyproject.toml
evals.expected_output: Should create .venv with uv, set up pyproject.toml, and use uv sync to install dependencies

evals.prompt: Set up a Go project with go.mod. Download dependencies and verify the build works
evals.expected_output: Should detect Go from go.mod, run go mod download, and verify with go build

evals.prompt: Start a new Rust project with Cargo.toml. Build the project and run cargo test
evals.expected_output: Should detect Rust from Cargo.toml, run cargo build, and cargo test to verify
